title: Cold assault battle droid
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|snow}} {{DroidSeries |image=[[File:Snowdroid.jpg]] |name=Cold assault battle droid
"Snow droid" |creator= |manufacturer= |designer= |homeworld= |line= |model= |class=[[Battle droid/Legends|Battle droid]] |degree= |cost=5,500 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] |length= |width= |height= |mass= |gender= |sensor=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |plating= |armament= |equipment=[[Heavy blaster rifle/Legends|Heavy blaster rifle]]''[[The Clone Wars Campaign Guide]]'' |affiliation=[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] |firstmade= |retired= }} The '''cold assault battle droid''', or '''snow droid''', was a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droid]] similar to the [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2 super battle droid]] used on [[Planet/Legends|planets]] with arctic climates. ==Characteristics== [[File:Cw_plokoon.jpg|thumb|180|left|[[Plo Koon/Legends|Plo Koon]] dispatches a Cold assault battle droid.]] Built for use in arctic climates, cold assault battle droids-or "snow droids"- were built on an enlarged [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2-series battle droid]] chassis but with their wrist blasters removed to accommodate the snow droid's greater grip strength. The [[Heavy blaster rifle/Legends|heavy blaster rifle]] that replaces the wrist blasters was a more dangerous weapon, but the droid was still extremely effective even when it lost its main armament. The major design flaw of the cold assault battle droid was that its large feet--designed to keep it stable on snowy ground--slowed it significantly when running. ==History== [[Saesee Tiin/Legends|Saesee Tiin]] encountered some on a [[Mission to Diado|mission]] to [[Diado]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. With the help of thief [[Na-Jia]], Saesee Tiin was able to destroy them and the entire droid forces using a stolen [[CIS-Advanced starfighter]], liberating the planet from the CIS. {{Droid-stub}} ==Appearances== *{{CWACite|6|It Takes a Thief}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' {{ID|snowdroid}} *''[[The Clone Wars Campaign Guide]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |nl=Cold Assault Battle Droid }} [[Category:B-series battle droid models|B2-Z Cold]] [[Category:Droid models of the Confederacy of Independent Systems]]
